title: Hornet Removal in South Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal in South Bronx, Bronx. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Serving Mott Haven, Melrose & all South Bronx neighborhoods. Call now!
intro: South Bronx residents facing hornet infestations need fast, professional removal to protect their families and neighbors. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert hornet nest elimination services throughout South Bronx, from the residential blocks of Mott Haven to the bustling commercial corridors near Yankee Stadium. Our trained technicians safely remove hornet nests from homes, apartment buildings, and businesses for $350-$550.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in South Bronx's unique pest control challenges, with extensive experience servicing the area's diverse mix of pre-war walk-ups, public housing, and newer developments. Our technicians arrive quickly, work efficiently, and guarantee complete hornet nest removal with follow-up protection to prevent re-infestation.
localContext: South Bronx's dense urban environment, from the tree-lined streets of Mott Haven to the parks along the Harlem River, creates ideal conditions for hornet nests in building eaves, fire escapes, and courtyard areas. The neighborhood's mix of older apartment buildings and row houses often feature the sheltered overhangs and vents where hornets commonly establish colonies.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service throughout South Bronx, including Mott Haven, Melrose, Port Morris, and Hunts Point. Our technicians understand the urgency of hornet situations and prioritize rapid response to protect residents from painful stings.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes full inspection, safe nest removal using professional-grade equipment, treatment of the affected area to eliminate remaining hornets, proper nest disposal, and preventative measures to discourage future nesting. Price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and building height.

faqs.question: Are hornet nests common in South Bronx apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, South Bronx's many older apartment buildings with fire escapes, air conditioning units, and roof access points provide numerous sheltered locations where hornets build nests. We regularly service multi-family buildings throughout the neighborhood and work with building management to ensure tenant safety.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for children and pets in South Bronx homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted removal methods that minimize exposure to treatments while effectively eliminating the hornet threat. Our technicians take extra precautions in residential areas and provide clear safety instructions to families before, during, and after the removal process.
